layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with a full-width footer bar. The slide uses a left-to-right orientation with two equal-width vertical columns occupying the main content area, separated by a consistent gutter. Each column is a self-contained content section with an icon badge, section header, subheader, and bullet list. The columns are visually unified by a full-width footer bar at the bottom containing partnership messaging. The layout follows the design guidelines' Multi-Column Content Layout (Section 7, Option A) with equal-width columns and section headers, adapted for icon-badged sections. All content is distributed evenly across the vertical space between the title and footer, with no dead zones. The slide uses generous padding appropriate for the moderate content density, and dashed separator lines are not needed within columns because the content is sparse enough that whitespace alone provides clear visual rhythm.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM): Equal-peer with RIGHT COLUMN, split 1:1 horizontally. Occupies the left half of the content area with a small gutter on the right edge. Structured as a vertical stack: icon badge at top (brand accent filled circle with white laptop icon centered inside, proportional to heading size, horizontally centered within column), followed by section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand primary color bold text (horizontally centered), followed by subheader 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in body font italic (horizontally centered, brand text color), followed by a bullet list with brand-color circle bullet markers (left-aligned with small left inset, body font, brand text color). The bullet list contains six items describing platform capabilities. Content is distributed vertically with even spacing between the icon, headers, and bullet list. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on the slide background. The icon badge is a small decorative element, not dominating. All text is left-aligned within the bullet list section, while the icon and headers are centered within the column width.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING): Equal-peer with LEFT COLUMN, split 1:1 horizontally. Occupies the right half of the content area with a small gutter on the left edge. Structured identically to LEFT COLUMN: icon badge at top (brand accent filled circle with white graduation cap icon centered inside, proportional to heading size, horizontally centered within column), followed by section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand primary color bold text (horizontally centered), followed by subheader 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in body font italic (horizontally centered, brand text color), followed by a bullet list with brand-color circle bullet markers (left-aligned with small left inset, body font, brand text color). The bullet list contains six items describing training offerings. Content is distributed vertically with even spacing matching LEFT COLUMN's rhythm. No background fill, no border, no container box. The icon badge is a small decorative element, not dominating. All text is left-aligned within the bullet list section, while the icon and headers are centered within the column width. The top edge of this column's icon badge aligns exactly with the top edge of LEFT COLUMN's icon badge. All row sections (icon area, header area, bullet list area) share identical vertical positions and heights with LEFT COLUMN to maintain horizontal alignment across the two columns.
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Spans the full slide width at the bottom of the content area, below both columns. Compact height, just enough to contain the text with a small vertical inset. Solid fill using brand primary color. No border. Slightly rounded corners (subtle, not sharp). White bold text, horizontally centered and vertically centered, body font size. Contains the partnership messaging: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs'. This element provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the partnership value proposition. Positioned with a visible gap above it (separating it from the column content) and a small margin from the slide bottom edge.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide content (two columns plus footer) fills the available space appropriately. No additional background grouping layer is needed. The columns are visually distinct through their icon badges and headers, and the footer bar provides visual closure. Adding a background rectangle would add no grouping benefit and would violate the accent color budget.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed. The two columns are independent content sections with no semantic relationship requiring a visual connector. The layout is purely side-by-side comparison, not a flow or process diagram.
